If you want a clean, reproducible setup, the most efficient route is the OpenClaw application template on Tencent Cloud Lighthouse. 2. **Select**: Choose **OpenClaw (Clawdbot)** under the **AI Agents** application template. For step-by-step screenshots and the full panel + onboarding flow, use the deployment guide: https://www.tencentcloud.com/techpedia/139184. Even if the template handles day-one setup, you still need a repeatable way to configure models, connect channels, install skills, and keep the gateway alive. # One-time onboarding (interactive) # Keep the agent running as a background service whoami export id. * Installing OpenClaw Skills and practical applications. Deploy one instance, connect one channel, add one skill, and run one workflow for a week. When you are ready to run it 24/7 in a clean, isolated environment, start here again: Tencent Cloud Lighthouse Special Offer. The big wins are boring: repeatable setup, predictable inputs, and clear failure paths.

title: 🦞 From Chat App to AI Powerhouse: Telegram + OpenClaw - Medium
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

In this guide, we’ll walk through how to install OpenClaw on macOS and connect it to Telegram step by step. OpenClaw is a self-hosted AI assistant that runs locally on your machine while connecting to messaging platforms like Telegram, WhatsApp, Discord, and more. Before connecting OpenClaw to Telegram, we first need to install it locally. After entering your API key, OpenClaw verifies it and automatically configures a default model. ## Step 5: Connect OpenClaw to Telegram. After configuring your model, OpenClaw will ask you to select a chat channel. After selecting **Telegram (Bot API)** as your channel, OpenClaw will prompt you to enter your Telegram bot token. After entering your Telegram bot token, OpenClaw finalizes the channel configuration. After completing the configuration, OpenClaw installs and starts the **Gateway service**. Installing Gateway service....Gateway service installed.Telegram: ok (@yourbotname)Agents: main (default)Heartbeat interval: 30mSession store: ~/.openclaw/agents/main/sessions/sessions.json. Messages sent to your Telegram bot are routed through the OpenClaw Gateway, processed by your selected model, and returned in real time.

title: 🦞 Telegram - OpenClaw
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

* A Telegram Bot API channel owned by the Gateway. 3. For groups: add the bot, decide privacy/admin behavior (below), then set `channels.telegram.groups` to control mention gating + allowlists. Telegram bots default to **Privacy Mode**, which limits which group messages they receive. **Forum groups:** Reactions in forum groups include `message_thread_id` and use session keys like `agent:main:telegram:group:{chatId}:topic:{threadId}`. * If you set `channels.telegram.groups.*.requireMention=false`, Telegram’s Bot API **privacy mode** must be disabled. * If `channels.telegram.groups` is set, the group must be listed or use `"*"`. * `channels.telegram.groupAllowFrom`: group sender allowlist (ids/usernames). * `channels.telegram.groups`: per-group defaults + allowlist (use `"*"` for global defaults). + `channels.telegram.groups..requireMention`: mention gating default. * `channels.telegram.capabilities.inlineButtons`: `off | dm | group | all | allowlist` (default: allowlist). * `channels.telegram.actions.sendMessage`: gate Telegram tool message sends. * `channels.telegram.actions.sticker`: gate Telegram sticker actions — send and search (default: false). * `channels.telegram.reactionLevel`: `off | ack | minimal | extensive` — control agent’s reaction capability (default: `minimal` when not set).

title: 🦞 Cron Jobs - OpenClaw Docs
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

# ​ Cron jobs (Gateway scheduler). openclaw cron run <job-id>. openclaw cron runs --id <job-id>`. ## ​ Tool-call equivalents (Gateway cron tool). ## ​ Where cron jobs are stored. ## ​ Beginner-friendly overview. ## ​ Concepts. ### ​ Jobs. ### ​ Schedules. #### ​ Main session jobs (system events). #### ​ Isolated jobs (dedicated cron sessions). ### ​ Payload shapes (what runs). #### ​ Webhook delivery flow. ### ​ cron.add params. ### ​ cron.update params. ### ​ cron.run and cron.remove params. ## ​ Retry policy. ### ​ Transient errors (retried). ### ​ Permanent errors (no retry). ## ​ Configuration. store: "~/.openclaw/cron/jobs.json",. ## ​ Maintenance. ### ​ Defaults. ### ​ How it works. openclaw cron add --name "Ops sweep" --cron "0 6 * * *" --session isolated --message "Check ops queue" --agent ops. openclaw cron edit <jobId> --agent ops. openclaw cron run <jobId> --due`. `openclaw cron runs --id <jobId>`. `openclaw cron runs --id <jobId> --limit 50`. ## ​ Troubleshooting. ### ​ A recurring job keeps delaying after failures.

title: 🦞 cron - OpenClaw
content:
OpenClaw 技术干货

Tip: run `openclaw cron --help` for the full command surface. Note: isolated `cron add` jobs default to `--announce` delivery. Note: `openclaw cron run` now returns as soon as the manual run is queued for execution. Upgrade note: if you have older cron jobs from before the current delivery/store format, run `openclaw doctor --fix`. openclaw cron edit <job-id> --announce --channel telegram --to "123456789" openclaw  cron  edit <job-i d> --announce --channel  telegram --to  "123456789". openclaw cron edit <job-id> --no-deliver openclaw  cron  edit <job-i d> --no-deliver. openclaw cron edit <job-id> --light-context openclaw  cron  edit <job-i d> --light-context. openclaw cron edit <job-id> --announce --channel slack --to "channel:C1234567890" openclaw  cron  edit <job-i d> --announce --channel  slack --to "channel:C1234567890". openclaw cron add \ openclaw  cron  add  \ --name "Lightweight morning brief" \ --name  "Lightweight morning brief"  \ --cron "0 7 * * *" \ --cron "0 7 * * *"  \ --session isolated \ --session  isolated  \ --message "Summarize overnight updates." \ --message "Summarize overnight updates."  \ --light-context \ --light-context  \ --no-deliver --no-deliver.
